name: aegis-firewall
description: Runtime security firewall for AI agents. Intercepts tool calls, scores risk (0.0-1.0), enforces YAML policies, and blocks dangerous actions with human-in-the-loop approval for sensitive operations.
examples: evaluate if this shell command is safe to run
check risk score for sending an email
is this file deletion allowed by policy?
show me the current firewall policies
load agent card and auto-configure security rules

endpoints./batch-evaluate: Evaluate multiple tool calls in one request (POST)
endpoints./traces: Return verdicts from the current session (GET)
